SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.NemResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.NemResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
public static class NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.NemResult extends Object implements Serializable
Time-series result of a non-equilibrium blowdown run.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    • NemResult

      public NemResult()

  • Method Details

    • append

      void append(double t, double pBara, double tGas, double tLiq, double tWall, double mGas, double mLiq)
      Appends a state to the trajectory.
      Parameters:
      t - time in s
      pBara - pressure in bara
      tGas - vapour-zone temperature in K
      tLiq - liquid-zone temperature in K
      tWall - wall temperature in K
      mGas - vapour-zone mass in kg
      mLiq - liquid-zone mass in kg

    • recordFinal

      void recordFinal(double tGas, double tLiq)
      Records the final zone temperatures.
      Parameters:
      tGas - final vapour-zone temperature in K
      tLiq - final liquid-zone temperature in K
